title: Slovakian Smoked Pork Dumplings
description: A hearty Slovakian dish featuring smoked pork and traditional dumplings, perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine flour, salt, and pepper.
Add the beaten egg and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces.
Roll each piece into a ball and flatten slightly.
Heat a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the butter and cook until melted.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the smoked pork shoulder and cook until browned.
Add the bacon bits and cook for 1 minute.
Add the dumplings to the skillet and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until cooked through.
Serve the dumplings hot with the smoked pork and onion mixture spooned over the top.
